entry.title: The new GPT-5.6 family: Luna, Terra, Sol
entry.summary: OpenAI's latest flagship model hit general availability this morning , and comes in three sizes: Luna, Terra, and Sol (from smallest to largest). The new models are priced per 1M input/output tokens as Luna $1/$6, Terra $2.50/$15, Sol $5/$30. For comparison, the Claude Opus series are $5/$25 and the Claude Fable 5 is $

entry.title: qwen-code v0.7.1 released
entry.summary: cua-driver prebuilt binaries — relative-coordinate fork (vendored under packages/cua-driver ). macOS : codesigned + notarized universal binary + QwenCuaDriver.app Linux : unsigned (x86_64 + arm64, glibc 2.31 floor) Windows : unsigned (x86_64 + arm64) Enable relative coordinates: CUA_DRIVER_RS_COORDINATE_SPACE=1 (defaul — Also covered by: anthropics/claude-code

entry.title: NVIDIA Nemotron Achieves Benchmark-Leading Performance With LangChain Deep Agents Harness
entry.summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra is offering leading performance at lower cost than top closed models with the largest and most widely adopted AI agent orchestration platform. LangChain tuned its Deep Agents harness for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, achieving the highest accuracy among open models, while completing more tasks at hig

entry.title: NVIDIA and Hugging Face bring new models and frameworks to LeRobot
entry.summary: Hugging Face LeRobot is an open-source robotics library for training, running, and sharing robot datasets, models, policies, and workflows. The post NVIDIA and Hugging Face bring new models and frameworks to LeRobot appeared first on The Robot Report . — Also covered by: NVIDIA Blog

entry.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
entry.summary: More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.

entry.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
entry.summary: OpenAI's latest family of models promise improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

entry.title: llama.cpp b9946 released
entry.summary: hexagon: tiling, tracing and optimizations for unary ops ( #25474 ) hexagon: tile wide rows in pointwise unary ops to avoid VTCM overflow unary: reject permuted tensors for now (not used by models) hex-unary: replace divs with fastdiv hex-unary: add vtcm layout and host computed kernel params hex-unary: move fastdiv in

entry.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
entry.summary: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.

entry.title: Willow Wealth CEO on Responsibly Growing Private Markets
entry.summary: Mitchell Caplan, CEO of Willow Wealth, discusses the evolving landscape of private market investing for individual investors. Caplan highlighted the trend of companies staying private longer, which has shifted significant wealth creation to the private phase before IPOs, citing examples like SpaceX and other mature pri

entry.title: GLM 5.2 is nearly as accurate as a human book keeper
entry.summary: Article URL: https://toot-books.pages.dev/blog/glm-5-2-vat-benchmark Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48850414 Points: 158 # Comments: 93

entry.title: Popular open source AI developer tool Ollama raises $65M, grows to nearly 9M users
entry.summary: Benchmark-backed Ollama has amassed 176,000 stars, and nearly 17,000 forks on GitHub by helping developers easily run AI on their PCs.

entry.title: Don’t let independent AI audits provide a false sense of safety
entry.summary: Opinion: AI policy researcher Keller Scholl argues that a marketplace of AI auditors will always prioritize speed and cost over safety

entry.title: [tl;dr sec] #336 - Autonomous Vulnerability Hunting, GuardDog 3.0, Are Bug Bounties Cooked?
entry.summary: An MCP powered system that's continuously finding and reproducing vulns, improvements to Datadog's OSS malware hunting tool, Hakluke muses on the future of bug bounty

entry.title: OpenMandriva Linux says contributor tried to sabotage the project
entry.summary: The OpenMandriva Linux project announced that it was the target of an attempted act of internal sabotage after a dispute among contributors. [...]

entry.title: WolfSSL, GeoVision, VTK vulnerabilities
entry.summary: Cisco Talos’ Vulnerability Discovery & Research team recently disclosed three vulnerabilities in WolfSSF, fourteen in GeoVision, and one vulnerability in VTK-DICOM. The vulnerabilities mentioned in this blog post have been patched by their respective vendors, in adherence to Cisco’s third-party vulnerability disclosure

entry.title: ForSight Robotics’ road to performing a fully robotic cataract surgery
entry.summary: ForSight Robotics' JASPER Platform assists surgeons with cataract surgeries, while still leaving the power in the surgeon's hands. The post ForSight Robotics’ road to performing a fully robotic cataract surgery appeared first on The Robot Report .

entry.title: Quantum Rings’ Open Quantum Product Now Available on the Qbraid Platform
entry.summary: Quantum Rings has announced a partnership with qBraid to make their Open Quantum platform available within the qBraid Lab. The development will provide developers and researchers free, subsidized access to QPUs from IonQ, Rigetti, IQM, and AQT. With Open Quantum, users will have available a unified access point to run

entry.title: PitchBook: US venture funding hit $412.7B in H1 2026, up 30% on all of 2025, with AI startup funding accounting for 86%, or $355.9B; Q2 saw seven $1B+ rounds (Duncan Riley/SiliconANGLE)
entry.summary: Duncan Riley / SiliconANGLE : PitchBook: US venture funding hit $412.7B in H1 2026, up 30% on all of 2025, with AI startup funding accounting for 86%, or $355.9B; Q2 saw seven $1B+ rounds — U.S. venture capital deal value hit $412.7 billion in the first half of 2026, nearly 30% more than investors put to work in all of

entry.title: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
entry.summary: Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.

entry.title: Ollama: all aboard open models
entry.summary: Serving 8.9 million developers, Ollama has raised $88M from Benchmark, Theory Ventures, 8VC, Y Combinator, and many incredible angel investors.

entry.title: ollama v0.31.2 released
entry.summary: What's Changed Enabled flash attention on older NVIDIA GPUs (compute capability 6.x) iGPU can now offload vision models with padding to fit available memory Fixed structured output for thinking models when thinking is disabled Hardened GGUF model creation ollama launch for Claude Code now disables telemetry by default

entry.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
entry.summary: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.

entry.title: Introducing Muse Spark 1.1
entry.summary: Introducing Muse Spark 1.1 Following Muse Spark in April , here's Muse Spark 1.1 - the first Spark model to offer an API. Meta claim significant improvements in agentic tool calling and computer use. There are a lot more details are in the Muse Spark 1.1 Evaluation Report . The "Attractor States in Self-Conversation" p

entry.title: Asian Stocks Set to Gain After US Chipmakers Rally: Markets Wrap
entry.summary: Asian stocks looked poised to gain on Friday after a resurgence in giant chipmakers drove a rebound on Wall Street. Oil opened lower in early Friday trading.

entry.title: Oil Steady at End of Volatile Week as Traders Assess Iran Risks
entry.summary: Oil steadied at the end of a bumpy week as traders assessed the risk to flows from a flare-up in fighting between Iran and the US.

entry.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
entry.summary: A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.

entry.title: OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna are now available in GitHub Copilot
entry.summary: OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 family is now rolling out in GitHub Copilot. GPT-5.6 comes in three variants, Sol, Terra, and Luna, so you can match the model to the job, whether that’s… The post OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna are now available in GitHub Copilot appeared first on The GitHub Blog . — Also covered by: Vercel Blog

entry.title: UN digital tech agency launches initiative to improve trust in AI agents - Reuters
entry.summary: UN digital tech agency launches initiative to improve trust in AI agents Reuters

entry.title: GeForce NOW Turns Up the Heat With New GeForce RTX 5080-Powered Toronto Server
entry.summary: This GFN Thursday brings more games, more power and more ways to play on GeForce NOW. The cloud gaming service is expanding with a new GeForce RTX 5080-powered server in Toronto, bringing dedicated high performance in the cloud closer to members across the region. NTE: Neverness to Everness also gets an update in the c

entry.title: Natural Language Autoencoders are summarizers, but do they have to be?
entry.summary: TL;DR : NLAs are an interesting idea. They do reconstruct the activations well, they can kinda audit model organisms for hidden objectives. But there are hints that they don't do what we actually want them to do. I tinker with the open-weight instances and find: verbalizations work cross-model and even cross-model-fami
